metadata.title: ChatGPT MD
metadata.description: A (nearly) seamless integration of ChatGPT into Obsidian.

regex.source: Notice("[ChatGPT MD] Error writing inferred title to editor")
regex.target: Notice("[ChatGPT MD] 写入推断标题到编辑器时出错")
Notice("[ChatGPT MD] 不支持移动设备。")
Notice("[ChatGPT] 从消息中推断标题...")

regex.source: Notice("[ChatGPT MD] Error inferring title from messages")
regex.target: Notice("[ChatGPT MD] 从消息中推断标题出错")

regex.source:
Notice(
                    "[ChatGPT MD] Could not infer title",
                    5e3
                  )
regex.target:
Notice(
                    "[ChatGPT MD] 无法推断标题",
                    5e3
                  )

regex.source:
Notice(
                    "[ChatGPT MD] Error inferring title. " + err,
                    5e3
                  )
regex.target:
Notice(
                    "[ChatGPT MD] 无法推断标题。" + err,
                    5e3
                  )

regex.source:
Notice(
              "[ChatGPT MD Mobile] Full Error calling API. " + err,
              9e3
            )
regex.target:
Notice(
              "[ChatGPT MD Mobile] 调用API时发生完整错误。" + err,
              9e3
            )
Notice("未找到活动的 Markdown 编辑器。")
.log("[ChatGPT MD] 检测到未关闭的代码块")

regex.source: .log("[ChatGPT MD] Error writing inferred title to editor", err)
regex.target: .log("[ChatGPT MD] 写入推断标题到编辑器时出错", err)
.log("[ChatGPT MD] SSE 连接关闭事件")

regex.source:
.error(
            `[ChatGPT MD] Error in Create new chat with highlighted text`,
            err
          )
regex.target:
.error(
            `[ChatGPT MD] 创建新聊天时突出显示文本出错`,
            err
          )

regex.source: name: "Create new chat with highlighted text"
regex.target: name: "使用突出显示的文本创建新聊天"
name: "清除聊天记录（保留前言）"
text: `[ChatGPT MD] 未找到 ${this.folderName} 文件夹。`

regex.source: text: `If you choose "Yes, Create", the plugin will automatically create a folder at: ${this.folderPath}. You can change this path in the plugin settings.`
regex.target: text: `如果选择“是，创建”，插件将会在以下位置自动创建一个文件夹：${this.folderPath}。您可以在插件设置中更改此路径。`

regex.source: text: "Settings for ChatGPT MD: Keep tokens in mind! You can see if your text is longer than the token limit (4096) here:"
regex.target: text: "ChatGPT MD 设置：注意令牌限制！你可以在此查看你的文本是否超过令牌限制（4096）："
text: "抱歉，我无法访问该链接。不过，请随时提供您需要翻译的英文文本，我会帮您翻译成简体中文。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Path to folder for chat file templates")
regex.target: .setDesc("聊天文件模板的文件夹路径")

regex.source: .setDesc("Generate text at cursor instead of end of file")
regex.target: .setDesc("在光标处生成文本，而不是在文件末尾生成文本。")
